race.comment: HEY DAISY (8) won a Class 2 over this trip at the Gold Coast two back then followed that up with a very good second over 1110m at Doomben last time. Should slide across and enjoy a lovely run in transit just behind the leading division. Has the right profile to take this out. SOOBOOCO (7) made a rare visit to the winner's enclosure recently when he led all the way to score comfortably over 1050m at Inverell. No favours done at the barrier draw which is a concern but he should be thereabouts. MANPOWER (15) started at $1.70 but found a couple better when resuming over this distance at Toowoomba last start. Lightly raced three-year-old with a fine record at 1000m. Must be considered. DEBUSSY (1) has his share of weight but is good enough to test this field at the second run back. WHERE'S THE FIRE (12) is fresh from a 50-day let-up. Form prior to that reset makes for good reading.
